ideation: This sequence simulates the act of examining something closely with a magnifying glass, held in the right hand and tilted to the left. The left arm remains at the side, providing a counterbalance to the focused action of the right arm. The animation starts with the right arm extended and the magnifying glass pointing forward.  It then tilts the magnifying glass to the left, then back to center, before returning to rest. The left arm remains largely static for balance and to emphasize the focus on the magnifying glass.  The sequence uses subtle changes in arm position to create the impression of careful examination.

frames.beat: right arm extends, holding the magnifying glass forward
tilting the glass down and left to inspect
returning the glass to center, still examining
both arms return to rest, the search is complete
